events.agenda: 5:30 Arrive, socialize; 6:00 Speaker 1, 2, 3, 4 presentations; 7:00 Networking happy hour; 7:30 After hours at The Lodge Sports Bar.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data. Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, AI, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.event_name: Seattle dbt Meetup, Late Spring 2026 Edition!
events.raw_text: Thu, May 7 · 5:00 PM to 7:30 PM PDT. Speakers: William Weld & Alexander Bogdanowicz (dbt Labs) on dbt Fusion/MCP; Bishal Gupta (Docusign) on dbt Fusion and MCP; Sundar Subramanyam (Docusign) on AI Assisted Development with Cortex for dbt; Ryan Bordo (Netflix) on integrating dbt core into Spark/Maestro.

talks.description: An overview of dbt Fusion, dbt MCP, and what's new and exciting in dbt from dbt Labs.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
William Weld, Principal Solutions Architect @ dbtLabs
Alexander Bogdanowicz Engineering Manager @ dbtLabs
Topic: dbt Fusion, dbt MCP, and what's new and exciting in dbt.
talks.speaker_title: Principal Solutions Architect; Engineering Manager, dbt Labs
talks.title: dbt Fusion, dbt MCP, and what's new and exciting in dbt

talks.description: Bishal Gupta discusses DocuSign's adoption of dbt Fusion and MCP after introducing dbt-core to the Product Data Science team.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
Bishal Gupta, Docusign
Topic: dbt Fusion and MCP
Bishal is a Lead Data Engineer at DocuSign with over two decades of experience in data analytics and BI solutions.
talks.title: dbt Fusion and MCP

talks.description: AI-assisted development with Cortex for dbt, from DocuSign's data and analytics practice.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
Sundar Subramanyam. Docusign
Topic : AI Assisted Development with Cortex for dbt
talks.title: AI Assisted Development with Cortex for dbt

talks.description: How Netflix is actively integrating dbt core into its Spark engine and Maestro orchestrator.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
Ryan Bordo, SWE, Netflix
Ryan is SWE at Netflix in their data platform team and actively integrating dbt core into our spark engine and maestro orchestrator using our workflow project management tool Dataflow.
talks.title: Integrating dbt core into Spark and Maestro at Netflix

events.agenda: 5:30 Check in/Registration; 6:00 Presentation: "For Builders, by Builders" by Lukas Schulte; 6:30-8:00 Reception.
events.event_description: In this meetup, we'll dive into the latest tools and ideas we've been shipping — what they unlock, how they fit together, and why we built them the way we did. This meetup is designed for builders, thinkers, and tinkerers.
events.event_name: dbt Global Circuit: Seattle dbt Meetup
events.location: Madrona Ventures, 999 Third Avenue, 33rd floor, Seattle, WA
events.raw_text: Wed, Jun 18, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM PDT. 6:00: Presentation: "For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs" by Lukas Schulte (Director, Engineering @ dbt Labs, and Ex-SDF Labs).

talks.description: The latest tools shipped by dbt Labs, what they unlock, and why they were built the way they were.

events.raw_text: Thu, Mar 27, 2025 · 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM PDT. Wolfram Shulte (SDF Labs/dbt Labs) on the SDF acquisition. Bishal Gupta (Docusign) on Migrating Stored Procedures to dbt models. Sundar Subramanyam and Mahalakshmi Sridharan (Docusign) on Automating dbt unit tests development with Gen AI.

talks.description: An update on the SDF Labs acquisition by dbt Labs and how SDF's SQL comprehension technology will accelerate the dbt developer experience.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Wolfram now Distinguished Software Engineer at dbt Labs, will update us on the SDF Lab's acquisition by dbt Labs and how SDF will accelerate the dbt developer experience.
talks.speaker_title: Distinguished Software Engineer, dbt Labs (Cofounder, SDF Labs)
talks.title: SDF Labs acquisition and the future of the dbt developer experience

events.agenda: 5:00 Arrive, socialize; 6:00 Speaker presentations + Interactive Session; 7:00 Networking happy hour at Linda's Tavern.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data. Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.raw_text: Thu, Nov 7, 2024 · 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM PST. Speakers: Wendy Grus (Snowflake) and Hadif Mufti (Smartsheet).

talks.description: Hadif Mufti shares his experience as a data engineer working on projects involving dbt and Airflow at Smartsheet.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
About Hadif Mufti
Hi my name is Hadif and I've been a data engineer at Smartsheet for almost 2 years now where I primarily work on projects involving dbt and Airflow.
talks.title: Data engineering with dbt and Airflow at Smartsheet

talks.description: Wendy Grus shares her experience doing data analysis and writing data pipelines at Snowflake.
talks.raw_text_excerpt:
About Wendy Grus
Wendy Grus is a Senior Data Scientist at Snowflake, where she spends her time doing data analysis or writing data pipelines.
talks.title: Data pipelines and analysis at Snowflake

events.agenda: 5:30 Arrive, socialize; 6:00 Speaker 1, 2, 3 presentations; 7:00 Networking happy hour; 7:30 After hours at The Lodge Sports Bar.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.raw_text: Thu, Mar 14, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 7:30 PM PDT. Speakers: Bob Madden (DocuSign), Bishal Gupta (DocuSign), Brandyn Lee (AgentSync) on dbt testing best practices.

talks.description: Bob Madden discusses establishing core dbt Cloud patterns and processes at DocuSign.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: When DocuSign adopted dbt Cloud a year ago, Bob worked closely on the implementation with a small team of engineers and has been responsible for establishing many of the core patterns and processes that are being used across the data engineering org today.
talks.title: Establishing core dbt Cloud patterns at DocuSign

talks.description: Brandyn Lee discusses dbt testing best practices: interrogating implicit assumptions and encoding them as tests.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: In this talk, we'll hear from Brandyn on testing best practices; more specifically, how to interrogate the unspoken, implicit assumptions you're making when authoring dbt models and proactively encode those assumptions as tests.
talks.title: dbt Testing Best Practices

talks.description: Bishal Gupta shares his experience introducing dbt-core and moving to dbt Cloud as the enterprise data platform at DocuSign.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Bishal initially introduced dbt-core in the Docusign Product Data Science and Analytics team and eventually moved to dbt cloud where it has been successfully adopted as the enterprise data platform
talks.title: Adopting dbt-core and dbt Cloud at DocuSign

events.agenda: 5:30 Arrive, socialize; 6:00 Speaker 1 & 2 presentations; 6:45 Networking happy hour; 7:15 After hours at Frolik.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.raw_text: Thu, Aug 10, 2023 · 5:30 PM to 7:00 PM PDT. Speakers: Christian Lam (Rad Power Bikes) on PII management in Snowflake with dbt. Dean Verhey (LaunchDarkly) on running dbt-core in production.

talks.description: How Rad Power Bikes leverages dbt to simplify and streamline management of PII in a Snowflake data warehouse, covering PII field detection, segregation of sensitive data, and data masking.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Christian will delve into how his team leverages dbt to simplify and streamline the management of pii in a Snowflake data warehouse. Expect insights on dbt's role in pii field detection, segregation of sensitive data, and data masking.
talks.title: Managing PII in a Snowflake Data Warehouse with dbt

talks.description: Lessons from seeing many dbt-core implementations across organizations, and how LaunchDarkly arrived at its current architecture with common pitfalls to avoid.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: You'll hear from Dean about some of those systems (good and bad!), how LaunchDarkly arrived at their current architecture, and some common pitfalls of running and maintaining dbt core in production.
talks.title: Running and Maintaining dbt Core in Production

events.agenda: 5:30 Arrive, socialize; 6:00 Speaker 1 & 2 presentations; 6:45 Networking happy hour; 7:30 After hours at the Black Cat Bar.
events.event_description: Welcome to the FIRST EVER dbt Meetup in Seattle!
events.raw_text: Thu, Apr 27, 2023 · 5:30 PM to 7:30 PM PDT. Speakers: Britton Stamper (Push.ai) on shifting from dashboards to metrics mentality. Mira Winkel (consulting) on pushing the art-of-the-possible in dbt.

talks.description: How to shift your organization's mentality from dashboards to metrics, better aligning departments and enabling downstream consumers to move faster, drawing on experience building Push.ai on dbt metrics and semantic layers.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: We'll hear from Britton how you can shift your organization's mentality from dashboards to metrics and use this new metrics mentality to shape your organization: better align departments, drive transparency and consistency, and enable downstream consumers to move faster than before.
talks.title: From Dashboards to Metrics: A New Organizational Mentality

talks.description: Mira Winkel discusses pushing the art-of-the-possible in dbt: exploring the graph object, redefining role-based access control, and accelerating data masking.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: In that short amount of time she's pushing the art-of -the-possible in dbt to satisfy the requests of her clients - exploring the graph object, redefining role based access control management, and accelerating data masking implementations utilizing dbt as the central control tool.
talks.title: Pushing the Art of the Possible in dbt
